markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, PSEO strategy, and upcoming tools.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**PSEO Unblocked:** The PSEO project will proceed with a simple, blog-style template to accelerate content production. GrowthX will provide a page list and navigation guide.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [**Content Access Resolved:** Access issues for the Product Naming doc and Battle Cards are resolved, unblocking the editorial team.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tool Launch:** GrowthX's new AI visibility tool launches next week, enabling HX to track its key metric for this initiative. A demo is scheduled for the next sync.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [**2026 Goals Session:** The Feb 4th session is pending David's availability. Its purpose is to align on strategy and define KPIs, including using the AI visibility tool for internal OKRs.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Process

  - [**Post Reviews:** The "Radar vs. HX" post is ready for review after incorporating Chris's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [**SEO Post Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [**Problem:** SEO-focused posts appear as the newest content on the blog homepage, which is not the desired user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [**Solution:** Manually set an older publication date in Framer. GrowthX will investigate automating this.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Content Access Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
      - [**Product Naming Doc:** A Notion embedding issue blocked access.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
          - [**Fix:** Franki will request access from the page owner (Chris) or export the table as a PDF.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [**Battle Cards:** Rachel (GrowthX) had view-only access, preventing downloads.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
          - [**Fix:** Mehmet granted full access to the GrowthX team during the meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)
  - [**Blog Categories:** Franki provided the final list of categories in the chat.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
      - [**Rule:** The "Thought Leadership" tag is reserved for content written by internal SMEs.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)

### PSEO Project Strategy

  - [**Challenge:** Content production was blocked pending a design template to avoid a "wall of text" that would perform poorly for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [**Decision:** Proceed with a simple, blog-style template to accelerate content creation and begin seeing results.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This unblocks the project and allows for a faster launch. A more sophisticated design can be layered on later.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [**Page Structure:** The original Notion brief's structure (H2s, H3s, bullets) is confirmed as accurate.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Note:** Page length will vary based on whether it covers a single LOB or rolls up multiple "sub-lines of business."](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [**Next Steps:**](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
          - [Confirm the Notion brief's structure is still accurate.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
          - [Provide the full list of pages by LOB.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
          - [Deliver a guide for the required two-layer directory linking structure.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [**HX:**](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
          - [Build the simple, rich-text template in Framer.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [**Content Review:** Franki noted that initial content outputs will require SME review for accuracy before full-scale publication.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)

### New Initiatives & Tools

  - [**Podcast-to-Blog Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
      - [**Source:** The "Underwriting Intelligence Podcast" (Amrit's founder brand project), available on YouTube, Spotify, and Apple Podcasts.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** A potential new content stream while PSEO pages are in development.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [**Note:** A broken link to an old "Voice of Insurance" episode was flagged.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [**Google Tag Manager (GTM) Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [**Purpose:** To investigate a cookie issue.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [**Action:** Franki will coordinate with Alicia (HX) to grant GTM access to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tool:**](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
      - [**Launch:** Staged rollout begins next week.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
      - [**Demo:** Scheduled for the next weekly sync.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
      - [**Significance:** This tool will track the key metric for this initiative, enabling HX to use it for internal OKRs.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)

  - [**Franki (HX):**](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

      - [Coordinate with Alicia to grant GrowthX GTM access.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [Build the simple PSEO template in Framer.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [**Bailey (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [Confirm the Notion brief's structure is still accurate.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [Provide the full list of PSEO pages by LOB.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [Deliver the guide for the two-layer directory linking structure.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [Check with Rachel to confirm Battle Card access is resolved.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)
      - [Investigate automating the publication date change for SEO posts.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
      - [Confirm with engineering the timeline for delivering PSEO calibration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [**Deyan (HX):**](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Confirm David's availability for the Feb 4th 2026 Goals session and notify Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/yiFzfL12xSuJfBLc8btX_XGyskqB_jzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
